Response.Say: Attention. This is an automated alert from Nova 7 Mission Control.
A fault has been detected in the launch telemetry system. The Elastic observability platform has identified an anomaly requiring immediate investigation.

The affected subsystem has been flagged as critical. Cascade effects may be propagating to dependent services. Please check the mission control dashboard or your Elastic Kibana console for full details.
An A.I. investigation agent has been dispatched to analyze root cause. Automated remediation workflows are standing by.
Repeating. A fault has been detected in the Nova 7 launch telemetry system. Please investigate immediately.
End of alert. This message will not repeat.
